title: hieracium subramosum subsp. subplicatum
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. subplicatum, a lesser-known species of the dandelion family, is a plant species native to certain regions. This plant is also known as hawk's beard, and its medicinal properties include having anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hieracium subramosum subsp. subplicatum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and roots, and can be used as teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
